name: SY8008B 1A Buck Converter
description: Silergy SY8008B 1A 1.5MHz synchronous step-down regulator, 2.5-5.5V input, 0.6V reference, SOT23-5.
dimensions_source: Silergy AN_SY8008 Rev 1.0 p.7: SOT23-5 (body 2.8-3.1x1.5-1.7, span 2.7-3.0, pitch 0.95) with recommended land pattern: pads 0.55x0.80, pitch 0.95, rows 2.40 c-c. Pinout p.2 (verified: 4=IN bottom-right, 5=FB top-right in column layout).
